svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex"> <diagram id="worker-lifecycle" name="Worker lifecycle"> <mxGraphModel dx="-549" dy="-180" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#e6e6ec;align=left;" value="SDK worker lifecycle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="520" x="40" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="receive" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#283a55;strokeColor=#8aaee0;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="1. receive bytes<br>transport subscription" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="70" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decode" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#283a55;strokeColor=#8aaee0;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="2. decode<br>TaskMessage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="320" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4a3e15;strokeColor=#e0c870;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="3. validate input<br>shallow schema" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="570" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="process" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2c4a2a;strokeColor=#9ad075;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="4. process<br>native payload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="820" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4a3e15;strokeColor=#e0c870;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="5. validate output<br>object-shaped JSON" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="820" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="publish" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3a2d4a;strokeColor=#b894c8;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="6. publish result<br>heddle.results.*" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="570" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reset" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#5a2e2c;strokeColor=#e88a85;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="7. reset<br>before next task" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="320" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="malformed" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4a3618;strokeColor=#e8b440;fontColor=#e6e6ec;fontStyle=1;" value="malformed input?<br>call hook and continue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="230" x="300" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="receive" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="decode"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="decode" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="input"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="process"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="1" source="process" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" edge="1" parent="1" source="output" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge6" edge="1" parent="1" source="publish" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;" target="reset"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge7" edge="1" parent="1" source="decode" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="malformed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge8" edge="1" parent="1" source="malformed" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#aaaaaa;dashed=1;" target="receive"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
